name: wasm_node_js_example_usage
description: Node.js example exercising the full verifiable-credential-toolkit WASM API

scripts.build: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --manifest-path ../Cargo.toml && wasm-bindgen --target nodejs --out-dir pkg ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/verifiable_credential_toolkit.wasm && echo '{"type":"commonjs"}' > pkg/package.json
